allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Force | Select-Object Name, Length, Mode; Write-Output "---FLUTTER---"; \(Get-Command flutter -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; Write-Output "---DART---"; \(Get-Command dart -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)
PowerShell(flutter pub add sqflite path uuid 2>&1)

Bash(ls "/c/pub-cache/hosted/pub.dev/file_picker-11.0.2/lib/src/api/" 2>/dev/null; echo "---README usage---"; sed -n '1,120p' "/c/pub-cache/hosted/pub.dev/file_picker-11.0.2/README.md" | grep -nEi "pickFiles|FilePicker|openFile|readFile|import |await|FilePickerResult|bytes|=>" | head -40)

PowerShell(flutter pub get 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 8; Write-Output "=== versões resolvidas ==="; Select-String -Path pubspec.lock -Pattern "^  \(share_plus|win32|file_picker\):" -Context 0,3 | ForEach-Object { $_.Line; \($_.Context.PostContext | Select-String 'version:'\) })

Bash(cd "/c/pub-cache/hosted/pub.dev/share_plus-10.1.4/lib" 2>/dev/null; echo "=== exports/classes ==="; grep -rnE "class Share|class SharePlus|class ShareParams|shareXFiles|ShareResult" *.dart src/*.dart 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "class Share|class SharePlus|class ShareParams|shareXFiles" | head -20)

Bash(echo "=== file_picker 11.0.2 android/build.gradle ==="; cat "/c/pub-cache/hosted/pub.dev/file_picker-11.0.2/android/build.gradle" 2>/dev/null | grep -nE "kotlin|KGP|plugin|namespace|compileSdk|JavaVersion|jvmTarget|apply" | head -30; echo; echo "=== share_plus 10.1.4 android/build.gradle ==="; cat "/c/pub-cache/hosted/pub.dev/share_plus-10.1.4/android/build.gradle" 2>/dev/null | grep -nE "kotlin|plugin|namespace|compileSdk|apply" | head -30)

Bash(fpdir=$\(ls -d /c/pub-cache/hosted/pub.dev/file_picker-12* 2>/dev/null | head -1\); echo "file_picker dir: $fpdir"; echo "=== android kotlin/KGP ==="; grep -nE "kotlin_version|kotlin-android|org.jetbrains.kotlin|builtInKotlin|apply plugin" "$fpdir/android/build.gradle" 2>/dev/null | head; echo; echo "=== pickFiles signature ==="; grep -nE "static Future<FilePickerResult\\?> pickFiles|allowedExtensions|withData|FileType type" "$fpdir/lib/src/file_picker.dart" 2>/dev/null | head; echo; echo "=== há platform getter ainda? ==="; grep -nE "\\.platform|static FilePicker" "$fpdir/lib/file_picker.dart" "$fpdir/lib/src/file_picker.dart" 2>/dev/null | head)
